title: Dish: Women, Waitressing & the Art of Service
original_title: Dish: Women, Waitressing & the Art of Service
overview: Waitresses serve up a delicious and illuminating look at the lives of women in the restaurant biz of Toronto’s diners, Montreal’s “sexy restos”, Paris’ haute eateries and Tokyo’s fantasy “maid bars”.
